title: AI support agent for an e-commerce platform
summary: Custom RAG agent over 50k product docs and historical tickets. Cut response time from 12 min to 38 sec.
highlights: RAG pipeline with hybrid search (BM25 + embeddings)
Agent with tool use: order lookup, refund initiation, escalation
Eval harness with 200 labeled cases, 92% pass rate

title: Multi-tenant SaaS migration from Heroku to bare VPS
summary: Migrated 12 production apps off Heroku to self-managed VPS + Docker. 68% cost reduction, zero downtime.
highlights: Containerized 12 apps with shared base image

title: Realtime analytics dashboard for IoT fleet
summary: Sub-second dashboard for 10k+ connected devices. TimescaleDB + WebSockets + custom aggregation.
